conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Specify a preferred time frame for the demo.
new_constraint: The email must include phrase "I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one."
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Specify a preferred time frame for the demo. The email must include phrase "I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one."
response:
Here are a few options, depending on the tone you want to convey (Formal, Casual, or Direct).

***

### Option 1: Professional and Formal

**Subject:** Request for [Product Name] Demo - [Your Company Name] Interest

Dear [Developer's Name],

My name is [Your Name] and I am a [Your Title] at [Your Company Name]. We have been researching solutions to improve [briefly mention the problem your company faces, e.g., our internal workflow efficiency], and [Product Name] looks like it could be a strong fit for our needs.

I would greatly appreciate it if you could schedule a product demonstration for us.

**I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one.** Please let me know what dates and times work best with your schedule, and I will ensure our team is available.

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to learning more about [Product Name].

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Company Name]
[Your Phone Number]

***

### Option 2: Friendly and Casual

**Subject:** Quick Demo Request for [Product Name]

Hi [Developer's Name],

I'm [Your Name] from [Your Company Name]. We're really interested in checking out [Product Name] to see how it could help us with [mention a specific function or goal].

Would it be possible to set up a demo sometime soon?

**I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one.** Just send over a few slots that look good on your calendar, and we'll make it work on our end.

Thanks so much!

Best,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]

***

### Option 3: Direct and Concise

**Subject:** Demo Request: [Product Name]

Hi [Developer's Name],

Could you please schedule a product demonstration for [Product Name]? We are eager to see it in action.

**I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one.** Please send over your availability, and I will coordinate with the relevant team members here at [Your Company Name].

Thanks,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]

***

**Remember to replace the bracketed placeholders** (like `[Product Name]`, `[Your Name]`, etc.) before sending!<turn|>
